STS2HOSHINO-STRIKE_HOSHINO.title: Strike
STS2HOSHINO-DEFEND_HOSHINO.title: Defend
STS2HOSHINO-FULL_BARREL_FIRE.title: Full Salvo
STS2HOSHINO-FULL_BARREL_FIRE.description:
Consumes all [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Ammo[/gold] consumed.
STS2HOSHINO-GOLD_WHALE.title: Golden Whale
STS2HOSHINO-GOLD_WHALE.description:
At the end of combat,
gain a random [gold]Relic[/gold] and
have a 33% chance to gain a random [red]Curse[/red].
STS2HOSHINO-AQUATIC_SUPPORT.title: Water-Side Support
STS2HOSHINO-AQUATIC_SUPPORT.description:
Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
When this card is returned to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] by a card effect,
its cost is reduced to 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} until played.
STS2HOSHINO-BD_NOTE.title: BD Note
STS2HOSHINO-BD_NOTE.description:
Choose 1 [gold]Entry[/gold] card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and put it into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Increase or decrease that card's [gold]Entry[/gold] value by 1.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold]. (Not implemented)
STS2HOSHINO-BITE_THE_BULLET.title: Bite the Bullet
STS2HOSHINO-BITE_THE_BULLET.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Trigger the [gold]Entry[/gold] effects of all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-BITE_THE_BULLET.selectionScr: Choose a card to trigger its Entry effect
STS2HOSHINO-BLACK_MARKET.title: Black Market
STS2HOSHINO-BLACK_MARKET.description:
Whenever you [gold]Reload[/gold],
add a random card that consumes [gold]Ammo[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-BLIND_SHOT.title: Blind Shot
STS2HOSHINO-BLIND_SHOT.description:
Consumes [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
STS2HOSHINO-BUTTSTOCK_ATTACK.title: Buttstock Strike
STS2HOSHINO-TACTICAL_BASH.title: Tactical Bash
STS2HOSHINO-TACTICAL_BASH.description:
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Out of Ammo[/gold]: Deals {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies again.
STS2HOSHINO-CHARGING_SHOT.title: Charging Shot
STS2HOSHINO-CHARGING_SHOT.description:
Consumes [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Entry[/gold]: Reduce this card's cost by 1.
STS2HOSHINO-CONTRACT.title: Contract
STS2HOSHINO-COVER_LOAD.title: Covered Reload
STS2HOSHINO-DETERMINATION.title: Determination
STS2HOSHINO-DOOR_BREACHING.title: Door Breaching
STS2HOSHINO-DOOR_BREACHING.description:
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Entry[/gold]: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to a random enemy.
STS2HOSHINO-DOUBLE_SHOT_ATTACK.title: Double Shot
STS2HOSHINO-DOUBLE_SHOT_ATTACK.descripti:
Consumes up to 2 [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Ammo[/gold] consumed.
STS2HOSHINO-EMERGENCY_FIELD_AID_SKILL.de: If this card is in your [gold]Deck[/gold], heal {Heal:diff()} HP at the start of each combat.
STS2HOSHINO-FIRST_SHOT.title: First Shot
STS2HOSHINO-FIRST_SHOT.description:
Consumes [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Entry[/gold]: Add a copy of this card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-HORUS_OF_EYE.title: Eye of Horus
STS2HOSHINO-HORUS_OF_EYE.description:
Place this card on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
While this card is on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], Attack cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] cost 0.
STS2HOSHINO-FIX_SHIELD.title: Fix Shield
STS2HOSHINO-FIX_SHIELD.description:
At the end of your turn, if you have [gold]Shield[/gold],
gain {FixShieldPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-FORWARD_DEFENSE.title: Forward Defense
STS2HOSHINO-FRAG_SHOT.title: Frag Ammo Box
STS2HOSHINO-FRAG_SHOT.description:
[gold]Reload[/gold].{IfUpgraded:show:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.|}
Until you [gold]Reload[/gold] again,
Attacks that consume [gold]Ammo[/gold]
apply {BulletVunePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-HIT_AND_RUN.title: Hit and Run
STS2HOSHINO-HIT_AND_RUN.description:
Consumes [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage.
Next [gold]Reload[/gold] this turn costs 0.
STS2HOSHINO-CLOSE_RANGED_COMBAT_SYSTEM.d: Whenever an [gold]Entry[/gold] effect triggers, gain {CloseRangedCombatPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and [gold]Shield[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-DEFENSIVE_STANCES.title: Defensive Stances
STS2HOSHINO-DEFENSIVE_STANCES.descriptio: Allies take 0 damage from enemies this turn.
STS2HOSHINO-PHALANX.title: Phalanx
STS2HOSHINO-INCENDIARY_SHOT.title: Incendiary Ammo Box
STS2HOSHINO-INCENDIARY_SHOT.description:
[gold]Reload[/gold].
Until you [gold]Reload[/gold] again,
whenever you consume [gold]Ammo[/gold],
deal {BulletIncendiaryPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
STS2HOSHINO-IRON_WALL_SKILL.title: Iron Wall
STS2HOSHINO-JACKPOT.title: Jackpot
STS2HOSHINO-JACKPOT.description:
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
[gold]Entry[/gold]: Reduce this card's cost by {LossCost:energyIcons()} this combat.
STS2HOSHINO-LAST_RESORT.title: Secret Weapon
STS2HOSHINO-LAST_RESORT.description:
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Out of Ammo[/gold]: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
[gold]Reload[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-LOCK_AND_LOAD.title: Lock and Load
STS2HOSHINO-PLATE_REPLACEMENT.title: Plate Replacement
STS2HOSHINO-MEMORIAL.title: Memorial
STS2HOSHINO-MILITARY_SUPPLIES.title: Assault Prep
STS2HOSHINO-MILITARY_SUPPLIES.descriptio:
Consumes all [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for each [gold]Ammo[/gold] consumed.
You cannot [gold]Reload[/gold] this turn.
STS2HOSHINO-MISS_SHOT.title: Miss Shot
STS2HOSHINO-MYSTERY.title: Mystery
STS2HOSHINO-NO_WASTE_RELOAD.title: Perfect Reload
STS2HOSHINO-ONE_LAST_SHOT.title: One Last Shot
STS2HOSHINO-ONE_LAST_SHOT.description:
Consumes [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
If used as your last [gold]Ammo[/gold],
deal double damage.
STS2HOSHINO-OPERATION_TIME.title: Operation Time
STS2HOSHINO-OPERATION_TIME.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Put {PutBack:diff()} cards from your [gold]Hand[/gold]
on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-OPERATION_TIME.selectionScre: Choose cards to put on top of your Draw Pile
STS2HOSHINO-PATIENCE.title: Patience
STS2HOSHINO-QUICK_RELOAD_SKILL.title: Quick Reload
STS2HOSHINO-QUICK_RELOAD_SKILL.descripti:
[gold]Reload[/gold].
Put the last card played this turn
on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-QUICK_SHOT_ATTACK.title: Rapid Fire
STS2HOSHINO-QUICK_SHOT_ATTACK.descriptio:
Consumes [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] is shuffled, add this card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-RAISE_SHIELD.title: Raise Shield
STS2HOSHINO-RAISE_SHIELD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Cost is reduced by 1 for each time your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]
was shuffled this turn.
STS2HOSHINO-RAMPAGE_SHOT.title: Rampage Shot
STS2HOSHINO-RAMPAGE_SHOT.description:
Consumes [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Entry[/gold]: Permanently increase this card's damage by {Increase:diff()} this combat.
STS2HOSHINO-RECOVERY_SHELL.title: Recovery Shell
STS2HOSHINO-REFILL_AMMO.title: Refill Ammo
STS2HOSHINO-REFILL_AMMO.description:
Return all Ammo Box cards from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold]
to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] with 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} cost and shuffle.
Draw cards equal to the number returned.
STS2HOSHINO-RETRACTABLE_SHIELD.title: Retractable Shield
STS2HOSHINO-RETRACTABLE_SHIELD.descripti:
Choose one:
Gain [gold]Shield[/gold] equal to [gold]Block[/gold],
or gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to [gold]Shield[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-RETRY.title: Retry
STS2HOSHINO-RETRY.description:
Shuffle {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]
into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each card returned this way.
STS2HOSHINO-RETRY.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose cards to put into your Draw Pile
STS2HOSHINO-REVENGE.title: Perfect Plan
STS2HOSHINO-REVENGE.description: Play the top card of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] {Replay:diff()} times.
STS2HOSHINO-RICOCHET_SHOT.title: Ricochet Shot
STS2HOSHINO-RICOCHET_SHOT.description:
Consumes up to 3 [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Ammo[/gold] consumed.
STS2HOSHINO-RUSH_STANDBY.title: Rush Standby
STS2HOSHINO-SHELL_STRIKE.title: Shell Strike
STS2HOSHINO-SHELL_STRIKE.description:
Deals damage equal to {ExtraDamage:diff()} times the number of [gold]Reloads[/gold] this combat.{InCombat:
(Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.)|}
STS2HOSHINO-SHIELD_ATTACK.title: Shield Slam
STS2HOSHINO-SHIELD_ATTACK.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {ShieldPower:diff()} [gold]Shield[/gold].
Deals damage equal to your current [gold]Shield[/gold].{InCombat:
(Deals {Viewing:diff()} damage)|}
STS2HOSHINO-SHIELD_REBOUND.title: Deflect Bullet
STS2HOSHINO-SHIELD_REBOUND.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a card from your
[gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of
your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-SHIELD_REBOUND.selectionScre: Select a card to place on top of your Draw Pile
STS2HOSHINO-SLUG_SHOT.title: Slug Ammo Box
STS2HOSHINO-SLUG_SHOT.description:
[gold]Reload[/gold] only 1 bullet.
Until you [gold]Reload[/gold] again,
Attacks that consume [gold]Ammo[/gold]
deal {BulletVigorPower:diff()} additional damage.
STS2HOSHINO-SNAP_SHOT.title: Autofire
STS2HOSHINO-SNAP_SHOT.description:
Consumes 2X [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Ammo[/gold] consumed.
Automatically [gold]Reload[/gold]
whenever [gold]Ammo[/gold] is empty.
STS2HOSHINO-SPRINT.title: Sprint
STS2HOSHINO-SUPRESSION_VETERAN.title: Suppression Veteran
STS2HOSHINO-SUPRESSION_VETERAN.descripti:
Whenever you consume [gold]Ammo[/gold],
gain {SupressionVeteranPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each [gold]Ammo[/gold] consumed.
STS2HOSHINO-SHOTGUN_SHUFFLE.title: Shotgun Shuffle
STS2HOSHINO-SHOTGUN_SHUFFLE.selectionScr: Choose a card to put on top of your Draw Pile
STS2HOSHINO-SHOTGUN_SHUFFLE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put 1 card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]
into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and shuffle.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
STS2HOSHINO-SWIMSUIT_FORM.title: Swimsuit Form
STS2HOSHINO-SWIMSUIT_FORM.description:
At the start of your turn,
choose 1 card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
It costs 0 until played.
STS2HOSHINO-TACTICAL_RELOAD.title: Tactical Reload
STS2HOSHINO-TACTICAL_RELOAD.description:
Whenever you [gold]Reload[/gold],
deal {TacticalReloadPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
STS2HOSHINO-TACTICAL_SHIELD_SKILL.title: Tactical Shield
STS2HOSHINO-TACTICAL_SUPPRESSION.title: Tactical Suppression
STS2HOSHINO-TACTICAL_SUPPRESSION.descrip:
Consumes 4 [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies 4 times.
Damage is increased by {ExtraDamage:diff()} for each [gold]Entry[/gold] effect triggered this combat.
STS2HOSHINO-TECHNIQUE.title: Technique
STS2HOSHINO-THREAT_SHOT.title: Threat Shot
STS2HOSHINO-THREAT_SHOT.description:
Consumes [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
STS2HOSHINO-TRIGGER_HAPPY.title: Trigger Happy
STS2HOSHINO-TRIGGER_HAPPY.description:
Consumes [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put all Trigger Happy cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
All Trigger Happy cards deal {TriggerHappyPower:diff()} additional damage this turn.
STS2HOSHINO-UNPLANNED_GAMBLE.title: Unplanned Gamble
STS2HOSHINO-UNPLANNED_GAMBLE.description:
Shuffle any number of cards from your [gold]Hand[/gold]
into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and shuffle.
Draw that many cards.
STS2HOSHINO-UNPLANNED_GAMBLE.selectionSc: Choose cards to shuffle into your Draw Pile
STS2HOSHINO-WEAK_POINT_SHOT.title: WeakPoint Shot
STS2HOSHINO-WEAK_POINT_SHOT.description:
Consumes [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] equal to remaining [gold]Ammo[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-WIDE_SHOT.title: Wide Shot
STS2HOSHINO-WIDE_SHOT.description:
Consumes [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Put 1 card on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-WIDE_SHOT.selectionScreenPro: Choose a card to put on top of your Draw Pile
STS2HOSHINO-RESPONSIBILITY.title: Student Council President's Responsibility
STS2HOSHINO-RESPONSIBILITY.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
[gold]Hoshino[/gold] plays the next turn for you.
STS2HOSHINO-FULL_BARREL_FIRE_PLUS.title: Burst Fire
STS2HOSHINO-FULL_BARREL_FIRE_PLUS.descri:
Consumes all [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Ammo[/gold] consumed.
If the enemy dies, [gold]Reload[/gold] and trigger this effect again on a random enemy.
STS2HOSHINO-CHOOSE_SHIELD_UP.title: Expand Shield
STS2HOSHINO-CHOOSE_SHIELD_DOWN.title: Fold Shield
STS2HOSHINO-CONCENTRATED_BREAKTHROUGH.de:
Consumes [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Cost is reduced by 1 {Energy:energyIcons()} for each empty [gold]Ammo[/gold] slot.
STS2HOSHINO-AUXILIARY_WEAPON.title: Auxiliary Weapon
STS2HOSHINO-AUXILIARY_WEAPON.description:
Choose 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
Add 2 copies of that card to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] respectively.
STS2HOSHINO-TEST2.title: Test 2
STS2HOSHINO-ENCHANT_SHOT.title: Enchanted Shot
STS2HOSHINO-BULLETPROOF.title: Bulletproof
STS2HOSHINO-BULLETPROOF.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {ShieldPower:diff()} [gold]Shield[/gold].
[gold]Entry[/gold]: This card's cost increases by 1 and gains {Repeat:diff()} [gold]Replay[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-TEST5.title: Test 5
STS2HOSHINO-TEST5.description:
At the start of combat, place this card at the bottom of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
[gold]Entry[/gold]: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] this card.
STS2HOSHINO-PREPARE_SUPPRESSION.title: Suppression Prep
STS2HOSHINO-PREPARE_SUPPRESSION.descript: Whenever you have exactly 1 [gold]Ammo[/gold] left, gain a [gold]Finishing Shot[/gold] that deals {PrepareSuppressionPower:diff()} damage.
STS2HOSHINO-FINISH_ATTACK.title: Finishing Shot
STS2HOSHINO-ARMOUR_PIERCING_BULLET.title: Armor Piercing Ammo Box
STS2HOSHINO-ARMOUR_PIERCING_BULLET.descr:
[gold]Reload[/gold].
Enemies hit by an Attack that consumes [gold]Ammo[/gold] lose {BulletArmourPiercingPower:diff()} HP.
This effect is reduced by 2 whenever you [gold]Reload[/gold] via the button.
STS2HOSHINO-LUBRICATING.title: Weapon Maintenance
STS2HOSHINO-LUBRICATING.description: At the end of combat, [gold]Enchant[/gold] 1 Attack card in your [gold]Deck[/gold] with {LubricatingPower:diff()} [purple]Sharp[/purple], or increase existing [purple]Sharp[/purple] by 1.
STS2HOSHINO-SUPPRESSION_ATTACK.title: Suppression Fire
STS2HOSHINO-SUPPRESSION_ATTACK.descripti:
Consumes [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] the leftmost card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and return this card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-SENIORS_GUIDANCE.title: Senior's Guidance
STS2HOSHINO-JINX.title: Jinx
STS2HOSHINO-JINX.description:
Consumes [gold]Ammo[/gold].
Deals {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Increase damage by {ExtraDamage:diff()} for each 3rd [gold]Ammo[/gold] used this combat, and decrease damage by {ExtraDamage:diff()} for each 4th [gold]Ammo[/gold] used.
STS2HOSHINO-ILLEGAL_TRADE.title: Illegal Trade
STS2HOSHINO-ILLEGAL_TRADE.description:
Deals {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
When this card is added to your [gold]Deck[/gold], obtain a [red]Debt[/red] curse.
STS2HOSHINO-QUICK_RESPONSE.title: Quick Response
STS2HOSHINO-QUICK_RESPONSE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever this card is put into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold],
gain {SecondBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-HORUS_OF_DAWN.title: Horus of Dawn
STS2HOSHINO-HORUS_OF_DAWN.description:
[gold]Innate[/gold].
Gain [gold]Strength[/gold], [gold]Dexterity[/gold], and [gold]Expert[/gold] equal to the number of [red]Curse[/red] cards in your [gold]Deck[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-SHOCK_THE_WORLD.title: Shock the World
STS2HOSHINO-SHOCK_THE_WORLD.description: Whenever you lose [gold]Shield[/gold] from an enemy attack, gain that much [gold]Block[/gold] at the start of your next turn.
STS2HOSHINO-SHIELD_SWING.title: Shield Swing
STS2HOSHINO-SHIELD_SWING.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] and [gold]Shield[/gold] equal to half of the damage dealt.
[gold]Out of Ammo[/gold]: Gain the full amount instead of half.
STS2HOSHINO-DEEP_SLEEP.title: Deep Sleep
STS2HOSHINO-DEEP_SLEEP.description:
Choose up to X cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] them.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] X times.
If X is 3 or more, [gold]Retain[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2HOSHINO-RELOADING_SYNDROME.title: Compulsive Reload Syndrome
STS2HOSHINO-RELOADING_SYNDROME.descripti: Whenever you play a card that consumes [gold]Ammo[/gold] and has cost {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} or more, [gold]Reload[/gold].
